name: rqmd
description: Brings the rqmd AI workflow to VS Code Copilot Chat with installable prompts, skills, and agent definitions.

chatParticipants.name: rqmd
chatParticipants.description: rqmd AI workflow assistant — brainstorm, implement, and ship with tracked requirements.

commands.name: brainstorm
commands.description: Explore ideas and promote them into tracked requirement proposals

commands.name: triage
commands.description: Review and rank backlog items; select the next-batch slice

commands.name: next
commands.description: Suggest the next best slice with a copy-paste /go prompt

commands.name: refine
commands.description: Sharpen requirement language, criteria, or priority

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Commit current work with a structured human-narrative message

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Re-run summary verification and targeted tests after changes

commands.name: pin
commands.description: Capture durable context, decisions, and quick-reference notes

commands.name: feedback
commands.description: Send improvement feedback about rqmd to the developer

commands.name: docs
commands.description: Improve repository documentation quality and structure
